ue_procedure: Open WBP_CanvasPanel_Image, select Image_29, set the CanvasPanelSlot anchors to center/center, alignment to 0.5/0.5, position to 0/0, and size to 200/60, then save and let UE compile the WidgetBlueprint.
notes: Covers full CanvasPanelSlot LayoutData rewrite in one command so BPX can match a UE-authored slot layout change fixture.
